leadText: Steelworker (Japanese: はがねつかい Steelworker) is an Ability introduced in Generation VII. It is the signature Ability of Dhelmise.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If a Steel-type move is used by a Pokémon with this Ability, its Attack or Special Attack stat is multiplied by 1.5 during damage calculation, effectively increasing damage dealt by 50%. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Steelworker has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] If a Steel-type move is used by a Pokémon with this Ability, its Attack or Special Attack stat is multiplied by 1.5 during damage calculation, effectively increasing damage dealt by 50%.
